reviews.comment:
Ambiente perfecto como todas el 90% de las ypf actualmente, atención regular para ser un lunes a las 14pm,  las hamburguesas hechas así nomás, ya estaban preparadas, en otras ypf en la ruta paramos y las hicieron en el momento con excelente atención. Podrían mejorar en cuanto la cocina.

(Translated by Google)
Perfect atmosphere, like 90% of the YPF stations these days. Service was just okay for a Monday at 2 PM. The burgers were just thrown together; they were already prepared. At other YPF stations along the way, we stopped and they made them fresh with excellent service. They could definitely improve their kitchen.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSLU9HQVJREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy bien atendido. Los turistas y extraños apurados.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Tourists and strangers were in a hurry.

reviews.comment:
EXCELENTE atenciòn para destacarlo en el restaurant, solo observo la falta de stock y existencia de todas las opciones veggies, también la lentitud para cargar combustible, igualmente es una gran opcion para detenerte en tu viaje

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service at the restaurant, I only noticed the lack of stock and availability of all the vegetarian options, and also the slow refueling. Even so, it's a great option to stop on your trip
